aboutParagraph1: Hi! I'm the developer behind My Album FIFA 2026 ☕⚽
aboutParagraph2: This app was born out of pure frustration 😂: I was pasting stickers and got tired of flipping back to the physical index every five minutes. So I built a search tool... and couldn't stop there. Today it's a full digital album: search your country, mark the stickers you have, log your duplicates, and track your whole collection from any device.
aboutParagraph3: And to keep the kids (and the not-so-kids!) entertained, I added fun facts about each national team. All free, no ads, and always in your pocket.
aboutParagraph4a: If the app saved you time trading duplicates or pasting as a family, you can
aboutParagraph4c: and it's more than welcome! With your support, Studio84 will keep the search tool fast, ad-free, and with new features I'm already planning. Thanks for the support! 🙌
